questions.q: Which 2018 BTS album was the first K-pop album to top the U.S. Billboard 200 chart?

source.notes: BTS reached #1 on the Billboard 200 in May 2018.

questions.q: Who founded SM Entertainment in 1995, helping create the modern K-pop industry?

source.notes: SM ('Star Museum') Entertainment debuted H.O.T. in 1996, BoA, TVXQ, Super Junior, Girls' Generation, EXO, NCT, and aespa.

questions.q: How many members are in BTS?

source.notes: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V, Jungkook.

questions.q: How many members are in Blackpink?
What does 'BTS' stand for in Korean (Bangtan Sonyeondan)?

source.notes: Bangtan Sonyeondan = 'Bulletproof Boy Scouts'. The fandom is called ARMY.

questions.q: Which Big Bang single, released in 2012, became one of K-pop's most globally recognized hits?

source.notes: Often associated with the global K-pop boom.

questions.q: Which Blackpink lead single from their 2018 EP 'Square Up' contains the line 'we pretty and we savage'?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: clarified to avoid confusion with the 2020 standalone song 'Pretty Savage'. From the 'Square Up' EP (June 2018).

questions.q: What is the major K-pop awards ceremony, broadcast across Asia since 1999?
